title: TODO: short title
description: The ext4 filesystem was not unmounted cleanly after a crash and is marked dirty. A filesystem check is required before it can be mounted read-write. The filesystem state must be set to clean with repair=completed, and the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/filesystem.state to see the repair status
hint_3: After fsck completes, the filesystem is clean and repair is confirmed
